nasb.text: He who steals must steal no longer; but rather he must labor, performing with his own hands what is good, so that he will have something to share with one who has need.

esv.text: Let the thief no longer steal, but rather let him labor, doing honest work with his own hands, so that he may have something to share with anyone in need.

cnv.text: 偷竊的，不要再偷，卻要作工，親手作正當的事，使自己可以把所得到的，分給缺乏的人。

ccb.text: 从前偷窃的要改过自新，自食其力，做正当事，以便能够分给有需要的人。

csbs.text: 偷窃的，不可再偷，反而要劳苦做工，亲手做有益处的事，好使自己能有所得，分给有需要的人。
